bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

secret.description: {name} needs an 8-byte secret key before it will accept commands, and it couldn't be read directly from the device (that only works while the device is unbound / factory-reset). How do you want to provide it?

menu_options.secret_cloud: Fetch it from my Govee account

secret_cloud.description: Log in with your Govee account to fetch {name}'s secret key automatically. Your credentials are used once to retrieve the key and are not stored — only the key is saved.

secret_manual.description: Enter {name}'s 8-byte secret key as 16 hex characters (e.g. a1b2c3d4e5f60718), or leave blank to add the device now and set the key later. You can obtain it from the Govee cloud account or a btsnoop capture.

reconfigure.description: Re-check that {name} is currently reachable over Bluetooth and reload it. For devices that need a secret key, you can set or update it below.

error.invalid_secret: The secret key must be 16 hex characters (8 bytes), e.g. a1b2c3d4e5f60718.
error.cannot_connect: Could not log in to the Govee account. Check your email and password and try again.
error.secret_not_found: Logged in, but no secret key was found for this device on the account. Make sure the device is added to this Govee account.

abort.no_devices_found: No unconfigured supported Govee devices found.
abort.not_supported: This Govee model isn't supported by this integration yet.
abort.not_found: The device could not be found over Bluetooth right now. Make sure it is powered on and in range, then try again.

scene_broken.message: The scene '{effect}' is known to fail to render correctly on this device and is disabled until that is resolved.
